steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “even in escape contexts” signals that evidence must show escape—the highest-stakes scenario—as the case where animals avoid maximal speed. This proves energy costs are powerful enough to override survival pressure.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
B directly demonstrates this: multiple lizard species move at less than 90% of maximal speed while escaping, showing that energy constraints are severe enough to restrict even life-or-death flight far below maximum.

The other choices conflate escape and pursuit (A), show animals using near-maximal speeds (C), or address the wrong context (D).

That matches choice B — B is correct.
